GammaRank¶

Given a vectorial Boolean function in univariate form, returns its gamma-rank

 1function gammaRank(f)
 2        R:=Parent(f);
 3        Fn:=BaseRing(R);
 4        n:=2*Degree(Fn);
 5        M:=ZeroMatrix(GF(2),2^n,2^n);
 6        W:=VectorSpace(GF(2),n);
 7
 8        Gf:={W!(Eltseq(v) cat Eltseq(Evaluate(f,v))): v in Fn};
 9        for w in W do
10                ww:=[Integers()!w[i]:i in [1..n]];
11                j:=SequenceToInteger(ww,2)+1;
12                GFtilde:={r+w:r in Gf};
13                for v in GFtilde do
14                        vv:=[Integers()!v[i]:i in [1..n]];
15                        i:=SequenceToInteger(vv,2)+1;
16                        M[i][j]:=1;
17                end for;
18        end for;
19        return Rank(M);
20end function;
